description_long: This object is a lever-action shotgun featuring a robust metal barrel and receiver, paired with a wooden stock and fore-end. The barrel is relatively short, with a smooth, dark metallic finish and a visible front sight. The wooden stock is full-sized, ergonomically shaped, and capped with a black recoil pad. A prominent lever loop is located beneath the receiver, indicating the action mechanism. The trigger guard is rounded and integrated with the lever, providing a seamless transition for operation. The overall design is compact and utilitarian, suitable for close-quarters use in urban environments.
description: A compact lever-action shotgun with a dark metal barrel, wooden full stock, and a prominent lever loop beneath the receiver.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden stock, dark metal barrel, and the lever beneath the receiver.
description_view_1: Front-on view showing the circular barrel opening and the narrow profile of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, metal barrel, and lever, mirroring the details seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Rear-on view showing the butt of the wooden stock and the slim profile of the shotgun.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, smooth and relatively short with a visible front sight and no ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized, integrated with the lever, no finger grooves or reinforcement visible
